mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.tenant_id, c.group_id, g.group_code, c.code, c.name, c.description, c.parent_id, c.sort_order, c.active, c.attributes_json, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.version FROM cd_code c JOIN cd_code_group g ON g.id = c.group_id WHERE g.group_code = #{groupCode} AND (c.tenant_id IS NULL OR c.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ) ORDER BY c.parent_id NULLS FIRST, c.sort_order ASC, c.code ASC

SELECT c.id, c.tenant_id, c.group_id, g.group_code, c.code, c.name, c.description, c.parent_id, c.sort_order, c.active, c.attributes_json, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.version FROM cd_code c JOIN cd_code_group g ON g.id = c.group_id WHERE c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE cd_code SET name = COALESCE(#{i.name}, name), description = COALESCE(#{i.description}, description), parent_id = COALESCE(#{i.parentId}, parent_id), sort_order = COALESCE(#{i.sortOrder}, sort_order), active = COALESCE(#{i.active}, active), attributes_json = CASE WHEN #{i.attributesJson, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler} IS NULL THEN attributes_json ELSE #{i.attributesJson, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler} END, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{i.id}
